case_title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. FARLIE HAMM et al

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.26 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT HAMM, FARLIE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMM, FARLIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 172 6TH STREET, APT 201, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ** JUDGMENT ALSO APPLIES TO ALL UNKNOWN/UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES **
